content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.53%, Bank Nifty -0.72%, Metal -1.92%, PSU Bank -1.53% with VIX +5.96% to 18.48 — broad-market weakness with elevated vol. Pockets of strength in IT (+0.75%), Pharma (+0.13%) and stock-specific catalysts (BANDHANBNK Q4 +10.88%, BAJAJ-AUTO +4.92%, CHENNPETRO +4.65%). Late-session (14:39, 50 min to close) — focus on managing existing book, trailing SLs on winners, and only highly selective new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2% (₹4,904 unrealized). Current SL 1027 already locks in solid gain. Tightening slightly to 1030 (≈1.4% below CMP 1044.85, comfortably above the trail-gap 0.5% rule) to lock more gains while leaving room for normal noise. Keeping target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge with VIX spiking +5.96%. -1.4% within noise; SL 119 (≈3.6% below CMP) is appropriate given low volatility profile. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1780.00,
      "new_target": 1845.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.2%, near 52w high (1851). Current SL 1780 already at breakeven+. No-op MODIFY would waste signal — keeping unchanged. Actually emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.8%, hit fresh 52w high 491.25 today then faded to 482.85. Current SL 478.50 is already a tight trail (≈0.9% below CMP) and locks in gain. Volume metrics negative per research (production -1.7%) — keep tight SL, don't loosen."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout (+68% PAT YoY), hit 52w high 201.48 then faded to 198.08. -0.9% vs entry. SL 195 (≈1.6% below CMP) is appropriate given the fresh breakout structure. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0% vs entry, intraday faded from 307.45 high. SL 296 holds. Crude tailwind intact but Mori#05 stop-production order is overhang. Hold; don't tighten further given normal intraday noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {

      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% vs entry. Q4 beat (PAT +22.8%) intact. SL 915 (≈2.5% below CMP) holds. Stock faded from 975 high to 937 — wait for confirmation of move higher before tightening."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PLACEHOLDER — ignore; converted to MODIFY/HOLD above."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 1027 to 1030 — locks in +4.7% guaranteed gain on a +6.2% winner. CMP 1044.85, gap 1.4% provides normal-noise buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; -1.4% within tolerance. SL 119 holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1780 already locked in gain; trailing further would put SL too close to CMP 1806.70 (1.5% gap, borderline). Hold and let it run toward 1845 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478.50 already trailed tightly (≈0.9% below CMP). No further tightening — would risk stop-out on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh breakout fading; SL 195 appropriate. Don't tighten — give the post-Q4 move room to consolidate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 296 (≈1% below CMP) reasonable given regulatory overhang. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, +1.1%, sector tailwind. SL 22.85 holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below entry, but Q4 thesis intact. SL 915 gives the post-results consolidation room."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GESHIP BUY @ 1542 LIMIT still OPEN (537m ago); CMP 1567.40 has run away from limit. Order hygiene: NOT stacking a second BUY. Letting it expire at close — if shipping theme holds tomorrow, will reassess fresh entry on pullback. CHENNPETRO, BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARTIARTL, RELIANCE all show strong setups but (a) it's 14:39 with 50min to close — late for new CNC entries, (b) BAJAJ-AUTO has Q4 binary May 6 (3 sessions away) so cluster-discipline / binary-event rule says NO new entry, (c) book already 42% deployed across 8 names, broad market weak (Nifty -0.53%, VIX +5.96%). Wait for tomorrow's open.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book in good shape: PNBHOUSING +6.2%, SUNPHARMA +4.2%, COALINDIA +2.8% are doing the work. GESHIP pending order needs to be cancelled or left to expire — flagging for next tick if still open. Rolling 5-day win rate 13% with profit factor 0.5x is poor — being deliberate about not over-trading on a weak macro day with VIX spiking. 50 minutes to close, no new entries appropriate now. Deploy 587K cash selectively tomorrow on pullbacks in the high-conviction names (BAJFINANCE add, RELIANCE on dip, possibly CHENNPETRO if it cools)."
}
